title: Replace service gallery images with uploaded Instagram screenshots in order

requirements.text: Replace the existing service gallery images in the ServicesGallery component with the 8 uploaded Instagram screenshots in the following order: Screenshot_20260223-202001_Instagram-2.jpg (Career/Money/Life section header), Screenshot_20260223-202059_Instagram-2.jpg (Love & Relationship services), Screenshot_20260223-202107_Instagram-2.jpg (Future of This Connection and Deep & Detailed header), Screenshot_20260223-202112_Instagram-2.jpg (1 Month Forecast and 3 Month Forecast with Schedule Your Reading button), Screenshot_20260223-202008_Instagram-2.jpg (Money & Abundance Reading and Life Purpose/Direction Reading), Screenshot_20260223-202048_Instagram-2.jpg (Personalized Voice Note Reading and Emergency Same-Day Reading with Love & Relationship header), Screenshot_20260223-202025_Instagram-2.jpg (Mini Readings with 1 Question Reading and 3 Card Reading), Screenshot_20260223-202043_Instagram-2.jpg (Premium/Exclusive with Soulmate/Twin Flame Reading and Personalized Voice Note Reading)

quotes: Replace service images with given images on types of reading in order

acceptanceCriteria: All 8 uploaded Instagram screenshots are displayed in the Services Gallery section
Images appear in the exact order specified matching the tarot service categories
Each image maintains its original quality and aspect ratio
The gallery layout remains responsive and visually consistent with the mystical theme

requirements.text: Update the serviceGalleryImages data array in frontend/src/data/serviceGalleryImages.ts to reference the 8 new uploaded screenshot filenames instead of the current service category image paths
acceptanceCriteria: The serviceGalleryImages array contains exactly 8 entries
Each entry maps to the correct uploaded screenshot filename

The order matches the sequence: Career/Money/Life section, Love & Relationship, Future/Deep sections, Forecasts with CTA, Money/Life Purpose, Premium services, Mini Readings, Premium/Exclusive details
All image paths correctly point to the generated assets directory

requirements.text: Render all 8 uploaded Instagram screenshot images as static assets in the frontend/public/assets/generated directory with appropriate filenames that maintain clarity about their content (e.g., career-money-life-header.jpg, love-relationship-services.jpg, etc.)
acceptanceCriteria: All 8 screenshots are saved in frontend/public/assets/generated/
Filenames are descriptive and indicate the service category or section they represent
Images maintain their original quality and format
File paths are correctly referenced in the serviceGalleryImages data

constraints: Do not modify the ServicesGallery component structure or layout
Maintain the existing mystical visual theme and styling
Preserve the responsive grid layout for service images
Do not alter the 'Schedule Your Reading' CTA button functionality
nonGoals: Creating new service categories or changing service pricing
Changing the order or content of other website sections
Adding new filtering or sorting functionality to the gallery
